# Support

## Getting Help

### Documentation

Start here for common questions:

- **[Deployment Guide](../docs/DEPLOYMENT.md)**: Installation and setup
- **[Architecture Overview](../docs/architecture/design/00-system-architecture-greenfield.md)**: How JobGraph works
- **[Connector SDK](../docs/CONNECTOR_SDK.md)**: Adding new ATS connectors
- **[FAQ](../docs/FAQ.md)**: Frequently asked questions

### Community Support

#### GitHub Discussions

For questions and general discussions:

- Go to [Discussions](https://github.com/XelWorks/JobGraph/discussions)
- Browse existing answers
- Post your question if not already answered
- Response time: 24-48 hours

#### Discord Community (Coming Soon)

Join our Discord server for real-time chat:

- `discord.gg/jobgraph` (link in README)
- `#support` channel for help
- `#announcements` for updates
- `#connectors` for ATS integration questions

### Issue Tracking

#### Bug Reports

Found a bug? Open a [GitHub Issue](https://github.com/XelWorks/JobGraph/issues) with:

- Clear title: `[BUG] What went wrong`
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected behavior
- Actual behavior
- Environment (OS, version, Python version, etc.)
- Error logs or screenshots

#### Feature Requests

Have an idea? Create a [GitHub Issue](https://github.com/XelWorks/JobGraph/issues) with:

- Clear title: `[FEATURE] What you want`
- Use case and motivation
- Possible implementation approach
- Any concerns (security, compatibility, etc.)

#### Security Issues

**⚠️ Do NOT open public issues for security vulnerabilities**

Instead, email: **security@jobgraph.dev**

See [SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md) for details.

## Feedback

### How to Give Feedback

- **Positive feedback**: Share on GitHub Discussions, social media, or Discord
- **Bug reports**: Create a GitHub Issue
- **Feature ideas**: Use GitHub Issues with `[FEATURE]` prefix
- **General suggestions**: Post in Discussions
- **Comments on code**: Create PR comments during review

### Feedback We Love

- Real-world use cases and workflows
- Deployment environment details (VPS, home server, Kubernetes, etc.)
- Performance observations (fast/slow features)
- ATS provider experiences and connector requests
- Security concerns or suggestions

## Response Times

We aim to:

- **Bug reports**: Triage within 24 hours
- **Feature requests**: Review within 48 hours
- **Support questions**: Answer within 48 hours
- **Security reports**: Acknowledge within 48 hours

Response times may vary based on contributor availability.

## Code of Conduct

All interactions in this project are governed by our [Code of Conduct](./CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).

Be respectful, patient, and constructive. We're all here to help.

## Commercial Support

### Managed Deployment (Future)

For organizations needing hosted JobGraph:

- Email: **enterprise@jobgraph.dev**
- Includes: Setup, maintenance, SLA support

### Consulting Services (Future)

Help integrating JobGraph with your systems:

- Email: **consulting@jobgraph.dev**
- Services: Custom connectors, workflow automation, training

*(These offerings are not yet available; listed for future planning)*
